violations.text: Inadequate lighting was observed in the walk-in cooler. The light intensity shall be: -At least 108 lux (10 foot candles) at 75 cm (30 inches) above the floor, in walk-in refrigeration units and dry FOOD storage areas and in other areas and rooms during periods of cleaning; -At least 540 lux (50 foot candles) at a surface where a FOOD EMPLOYEE is working with FOOD or working with UTENSILS or EQUIPMENT such as knives, slicers, grinders, or saws where EMPLOYEE safety is a factor. -Establishment shall replace bulbs with a brighter one New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
